en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid Authorization Certificate in the Czech Republic Trade Licensing Commercial Register Applicability Assessment questionnaire.\t

Upload your company’s authorization issued under the Auditors Act (93/2009 Coll.). A company must obtain an authorization under special laws if its intended activity is explicitly excluded from the Trade Licensing Act or requires additional sectoral approval.
Please upload proof of registration or authorization from your relevant professional chamber or authority.
